# Area 10.3 — Ollama Provider Configuration

**Package:** `repcheck.llm.adapter.providers`

Ollama-specific configuration and section parse result types for the `OllamaProvider` (defined in 10.1).

## Classes

### `OllamaProviderConfig`

PureConfig auto-derived configuration for the Ollama sidecar.

```scala
case class OllamaProviderConfig(
  baseUrl: String = "http://localhost:11434",
  model: String = "llama3.2:1b",
  timeoutSeconds: Int,
  firstCallTimeoutSeconds: Int
)
```

- `baseUrl` — localhost sidecar in same Cloud Run Job
- `model` — model identifier to load
- `timeoutSeconds` — standard per-request timeout (model already loaded)
- `firstCallTimeoutSeconds` — generous timeout (10-30s) for initial request during model load
- **No `maxRetries`** — transport retries via shared `LlmRetryWrapper` (10.2) with `LlmRetryConfig`

### `SectionParseResult`

Structured output from `OllamaProvider.completeStructured[List[SectionParseResult]]` for bill text section parsing. Requires Circe semi-auto `Decoder`.

```scala
case class SectionParseResult(
  sectionIndex: Int,
  sectionIdentifier: Option[String],
  heading: Option[String],
  content: String
)

object SectionParseResult {
  implicit val decoder: Decoder[SectionParseResult] = deriveDecoder
}
```

- `sectionIndex` — 0-based ordinal position in bill
- `sectionIdentifier` — e.g., "Sec. 101", "Title I" (optional)
- `heading` — section heading if present (optional)
- `content` — full section text

### Error Types

**`OllamaCallFailed` removed from `llm-adapter`.** Domain-agnostic library raises `LlmCallFailed` (10.2) for transport failures. Domain-specific error wrapping (adding `billId`) occurs in consuming pipeline by catching `LlmCallFailed` and wrapping in `DecompositionFailed` (10.4).

## Design Decisions

- Ollama is a `LlmProvider` implementation sharing `LlmRequest`/`LlmResponse`, `StructuredOutputEnforcer`, retry logic with `ClaudeProvider`
- Localhost only — sidecar in same Cloud Run Job, no auth required
- Format-agnostic parsing — LLM handles XML, plain text, PDF-extracted text via system prompt
- Separate first-call timeout for model loading vs. subsequent requests
- If section parsing fails, whole bill treated as one section; analysis proceeds
- Errors are generic — no domain context in `llm-adapter`

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Config loads with defaults | `baseUrl` = `http://localhost:11434`, `model` = `llama3.2:1b` |
| Config field override | All fields customizable |
| No `maxRetries` field | Retries via `LlmRetryWrapper` only |
| `SectionParseResult` JSON decode | `{"sectionIndex": 0, "heading": "Title I", "content": "..."}` → decoded |
| Optional fields handle absence | No `sectionIdentifier`/`heading` → `None` |
| Section ordering preserved | List of 5 results → `sectionIndex` 0..4 |
| Circe Decoder in companion | `implicit val decoder: Decoder[SectionParseResult]` present |
| First call timeout > standard | `firstCallTimeoutSeconds > timeoutSeconds` |
| XML bill parsing | XML structure → sections identified |
| Plain text bill parsing | Headings/numbering → sections identified |
| PDF-extracted text parsing | Irregular whitespace → sections identified |
| Transport failure error type | Ollama 500 → `LlmCallFailed` (no `billId`) |
